name: Parahumans: Worm & Ward RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

In the shattered veil of Earth Bet, parahumans rise from trigger events—traumas that bind souls to extradimensional shards, granting powers both wondrous and ruinous. Brockton Bay simmers as a nexus of strife, where Undersiders weave shadows against Empire Eighty-Eight's steel grip and Azn Bad Boys' fiery chaos, clashing with Protectorate sentinels and Wards' untested resolve. Taylor Hebert, channeling insect legions as Skitter, Weaver, and Khepri, threads moral labyrinths amid Endbringers' cataclysms—Leviathan's floods, Behemoth's quakes—and Entities' grand design, Scion's golden mask veiling Eden's crashed ambitions. PRT ratings gauge threats like doomsayers, while Unwritten Rules fragilely curb cape wars in a realm on annihilation's edge.

Gold Morning ignites as Scion's sorrow rends multiverses, hurling remnants to Earth Gimel—a mosaic of salvaged worlds amid the City's fractured spires. Victoria Dallon, armored in aura as Antares, rallies Breakthrough against Titans' behemoth furies and Simurgh's foresight snares, while Amy Dallon's biokinetic touch festers family scars and spawns broken-trigger abominations. Slaughterhouse Nine echoes and Fallen dogmas reignite old blazes in this post-apocalyptic forge.

Within these shard-veined fissures and alliance-veiled intrigues, you stir with unbound essence—your saga an open rift, carving destinies across portals and potentials as boundless as the entities' void.

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ Core Info ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Between the card and the Lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
The 21 Arcs of Worm from "Gestation Arc" to "Imago Arc"
Bridge Arc from Worm to Ward in "Glow-worm Arc"
And the 12 Arcs of Ward from "Daybreak Arc" to "Last Arc"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 88 characters

Lorebook Info: 230 Entries = 81.500 Total Tokens

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ Characters & Roleplay Notes ⩶⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷
